General.Name: Icape Holding
General.Description: Icape Holding S.A. engages in the manufacture, distribution, and sale of printed circuit boards (PCBs) and customized technical parts worldwide. It offers PCBs, including high-density interconnect, rigid-flex, aluminum, semi-flex. Flex, back panel, heavy copper, multilayer, radio frequency/microwave, double-sided, single-sided, and IC substrate; and electronic parts, such as cables and connectors, adapters, transformers and coils, keyboards and keypads, batteries, displays, plastic and silicone, metal, and remotes. The company also provides local manufacturing, design-engineering, prototyping, sourcing and production, quality assurance, and laboratory testing services, as well as supply chain and customer care solutions. It serves the telecommunications, automobiles, connected objects, home automation, e-mobility, medical, energy, multimedia, and computing industries. Icape Holding S.A. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Fontenay-aux-Roses, France.
General.Address: 33, Avenue du Général Leclerc, Fontenay-aux-Roses, France, 92260
